name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient supplier performance tracking causes missed discounts. We provide automated monthly reports instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking supplier performance and identifying cost-saving opportunities.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking supplier performance and identifying cost-saving opportunities.
